headline: Citigroup (C) Commits $25 Million To Housing Access And Affordability
summary: Citigroup, through the Citi Impact Fund, has committed $25 million to support companies using technology to improve housing access, supply, and affordability. The commitment is part of a broader five year plan that includes financing $60 billion for affordable housing projects. The program focuses on the intersection of financial services, housing solutions, and ESG priorities rather than traditional bank earnings or capital return updates.
